title: Dyeable Wood
description: Allows you to dye planks and other wood related items.
body:
# DYEABLE WOOD

## Features
- Dyeable planks
- Dyeable slabs
- Dyeable stairs
- Dyeable trapdoors
- Dyeable pressure plates
- Dyeable buttons
- Dyeable doors
- Dyeable fences
- Dyeable fence gates

## Recipes
Dyed planks recipe:

![Dyed planks recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdc1546945e8eb60898730135bb024f8115078b6.png)

Dyed planks can be crafted into stairs, slabs, trapdoors, pressure plates, buttons, fences, fence gates, and doors!

![One of the uses for dyed planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed6f49149c0c5cec68298889ada59343655639ce.png)
